conditionPolicy: Fifteen years without routine maintenance or organized cleanup. Use restrained decay, selective looting, faded paint and signage, boarded or broken glazing, roof wear, weeds, debris, and localized damage without making every structure uniformly destroyed.

placementPolicy.downtown: Build compact street walls with alleys, service gaps, civic anchors, shops, offices, factories, apartments, and region-specific corner buildings.
placementPolicy.residential: Use a thin inhabited-looking ring of complete lots with region-specific homes, small apartments, garages, churches, schools, and neighborhood services.
placementPolicy.assetRule: Every placed city building must use a MichiganMitten_Buildings model; no Chernarus building assets are permitted in the populated districts.
